name: lens-temper
description: LensTemper runs structured spec-driven development reviews with fresh reviewer subagents and lens-specific synthesis.

interface.shortDescription: Spec reviews with fresh lens reviewers
interface.longDescription: Use LensTemper to review specs, implementation plans, and design proposals through independent lenses. Start with the Start Plan Review skill for normal use; specialist skills are for one-lens reviewing, synthesis, reruns, and validation evidence.
defaultPrompt: Use LensTemper to run a full review of this spec.
Use LensTemper to review this plan with selected lenses.
